docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $495.88 FILED BY THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MITTELSTADT ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MITTELSTADT ROBERT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MITTELSTADT ROBERT $495.88 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $545.88 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
